retrieved_docs.content: The condition described as “Injury undetermined whether accidentally or purposely inflicted, by crashing of aircraft” is linked to the morphological finding of تَلَف الأنسجة (tissue damage). In turn, the tissue damage (تَلَف الأنسجة) is associated with سمية عصبية (neurotoxicity). This relationship indicates that injuries resulting from an aircraft crash, even when the intent is unclear, may involve underlying tissue damage that can give rise to neurotoxic effects, highlighting the importance of evaluating both structural and neurotoxic consequences in the clinical assessment and management of such trauma.
